title: Shinji Asuka sympothetic augh
wikitext:
[]: Shinji + Asuka *sympothetic 'augh'*             Quote Post by ice reaper » Wed Apr 27, 2005 2:16 pm this was mentioned in 'heh' and so i thought i'd beat everyone to it. continue with your convo.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Apr 27, 2005 2:18 pm I restate my last on topice post here to start thigs off. Next on to my reply Shin-seiki wrote: "So! We'll be alone tonight..."Come on, think hard ... what is she hinting at here?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 27, 2005 2:28 pm You should have asked me to split the thread. There is no post-moving feature, AFAIK...

[]:             Quote Post by no common sense » Wed Apr 27, 2005 2:34 pm I still want to throw things at my tv when I watch that kissing scene. Shinji you dumb bastard all you had to do was eithr put your arms around her or caugh out "wow" instead of standing their like a zombie.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Apr 27, 2005 2:38 pm I blame Asuka for her inability to feel needed and loved without Shinji on top of her. He's only 14 for crying out loud, and not a very mature 14 year old at that, what else did she expect?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 27, 2005 4:17 pm no common sense wrote: I think Shinji was more worried about the fact that he couldn't breathe. I would imagine it difficult to be romantic to someone who is cutting off your supply of oxygen.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Apr 27, 2005 4:26 pm Ok. First we have Asuka's wink. Then she plops her bed into the spare room, warns Shinji that death awaits him if he dares cross the walls of Jericho, complains about sleeping on the floor, then goes to sleep. Are you suggesting that she expected him to burst into her room while she slept? That really doesn't seem likely. As for her "incident" being preplanned, I seriously doubt it. She fell asleep beside him becasue that's where she's been sleeping for the past week. What exactly are people saying here?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Apr 27, 2005 4:34 pm you need to look over the old thread

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 27, 2005 4:48 pm DatDude wrote: you need to look over the old thread

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Wed Apr 27, 2005 4:55 pm Dave wrote: I blame Asuka for her inability to feel needed and loved without Shinji on top of her. He's only 14 for crying out loud, and not a very mature 14 year old at that, what else did she expect?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Apr 27, 2005 5:01 pm What are we discussing here? Is it the fact that Asuka wanted to sleep with Shinji, because the answer is both no and yes. She wanted to sleep with "The Great Third Children", not the seemingly uninterested boy she's been living with for the past week. I still don't get why Asuka's mood switched so suddenly from happy and cheerful to downright sour. Anyone care to give opinions?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Apr 27, 2005 5:10 pm bp32 wrote: At 14?? Even if you are not very mature you are still trying to get some at that point--well, at least, I was

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Apr 27, 2005 5:32 pm Lavender perfume?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Apr 27, 2005 6:15 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Ep#9 - I'll have to rewatch - I usually rewatch the last half of the series; but I think it's because he had spent all evening being a lump plugged into his tape player.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Wed Apr 27, 2005 6:30 pm Mr. Tines wrote: bp32 wrote: At 14?? Even if you are not very mature you are still trying to get some at that point--well, at least, I was

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Wed Apr 27, 2005 8:15 pm I think Shinji was more worried about the fact that he couldn't breathe. I would imagine it difficult to be romantic to someone who is cutting off your supply of oxygen. He was thrust into an unfamiliar situation without oxygen so he's mind was probably in somewhat of a panic without any idea of what to do. Shinji was flustered and thus didn't do anything. I blame Asuka for holding his nose.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 27, 2005 9:54 pm Asuka appeared to LOATHE the "Muteki na Shinji-sama", OMF. Where do you get this idea that she wanted Shinji, the Rival, the boy whose unwitting achievements depleted what little she had to pride herself upon?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Apr 28, 2005 2:05 am no common sense wrote: I think Shinji was more worried about the fact that he couldn't breathe. I would imagine it difficult to be romantic to someone who is cutting off your supply of oxygen. He was thrust into an unfamiliar situation without oxygen so he's mind was probably in somewhat of a panic without any idea of what to do. Shinji was flustered and thus didn't do anything. I blame Asuka for holding his nose.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Apr 28, 2005 5:29 am Reichu wrote: Asuka appeared to LOATHE the "Muteki na Shinji-sama", OMF. Where do you get this idea that she wanted Shinji, the Rival, the boy whose unwitting achievements depleted what little she had to pride herself upon?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Thu Apr 28, 2005 10:56 am maybe the subject is approached more timidly in Japan than in the states)...
